Team - I just met a fund manager who has invested in this property platform in the US… he said he believes this rev sharing model makes sense for Kyozo - perhaps for a certain “tier” of Kyozo Pro user - so they can earn from Kyozo. 
He said he thinks this has been a key growth driving for adoption and monetization for this company. 
I think it makes sense, but I also think we’d need to be careful about the optics of this sort of structure.
